query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY total DESC; SELECT id, nomeCompleto, status, dataDemissao, dataDesligamentoEfetiva, motivoDesligamento, categoriaDesligamento, observacoes FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND (status != 'Ativo' OR dataDemissao IS NOT NULL OR dataDesligamentoEfetiva IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY total DESC; SELECT id, nomeCompleto, status, dataDemissao, dataDesligamentoEfetiva, motivoDesligamento, categoriaDesligamento, observacoes FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND (status != 'Ativo' OR dataDemissao IS NOT NULL OR dataDesligamentoEfetiva IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 50;
